articles.title: RJ Scaringe has raised more than $12B across three startups and investors still want more
articles.summary: Investors can't seem to get enough of RJ Scaringe or his ideas. Storytelling and communication are one of his superpowers, according to Jiten Behl, who joined Rivian when the company had just a handful of employees.
